meaning: adj.适合的,相称的,适宜的n.试穿,试衣,装配,装置
examples: He wore an ill-fitting green corduroy suit.
Tight fitting T-shirts are making a comeback.
He could never be accused of fitting the mould.
Thirdly, we're envisioning a cheaper, mobile mobile iPad fitting into classrooms much better than the original.
Their hosts are comedy duo Gabe Liedman and Jenny Slate, fitting emcees for several reasons.
